posts.author: LeedsVoterWatch_84
posts.text: Just spotted this: https://t.co/removedx says voting rules in Leeds have changed. Official document claims new ID requirements and extended polling hours based on 'unofficial' guidance from a local group. Seems serious given the election is tomorrow.
posts.explanation: This post shares unverified civic information about changing voting requirements, which requires specialist verification to assess public harm potential.
